title: euphorbia pithyusa var. cupanii
intro: Euphorbia pithyusa var. cupanii, also known as Cupani's spurge, is a variety of succulent plant in the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Euphorbia pithyusa var. cupanii include its ability to reduce pain, inflammation, and fever, as well as promote wound healing and improve skin health. The plant is often prepared as a tincture or salve, and can also be used as a poultice to apply directly to affected areas.
